name: human-eval-workshop
description: Root package.json to enable Databricks Apps Node.js build flow

scripts.build: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org/ npm -C client install && npm -C client run build && NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org/ npm -C docs install && mkdir -p docs/static && python3 tools/spec_coverage_analyzer.py --json > docs/static/spec-coverage.json && npm -C docs run build
